title: App Settings - General - Notifications & Device Alerts  - Settings toggles On/Off
scenario: Notification and Device Alert toggle states in App Settings > General > Notifications do not persist after reopening the tab or restarting the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Android device.
Tap the Account icon or navigate to App Settings.

Toggle the following settings to Off (or On, noting initial state):
  - Device Alerts
  - Call Alerts
  - Meeting Reminders
  - Low Battery Warnings
  - Firmware Update Notifications
Close the Notifications tab (e.g., tap Back or navigate away).
Verify each toggle retains its selected state (On or Off).
Close the Poly Studio Mobile app completely (swipe from Recents or force stop).
Reopen the Poly Studio Mobile app.
Navigate to App Settings > General > Notifications.
Verify each toggle still retains its selected state (On or Off).
expected: All Notification and Device Alert toggles retain their selected state (On or Off) after reopening the Notifications tab and after fully restarting the app.
